description: v1.1.0: Added input timeout guard (30s cap) and explicit repaired_skill_id field validation in output schema. Fixes tool_timeout and api_schema_mismatch failures.

postconditions: output.repaired_skill_id contains the ID of the repaired skill.
output.success is true when repair completes without timeout.
preconditions: A failed skill with execution records exists.

name: repair_failed_skill
